name: Mailshake
description: A simple, focused sales engagement tool for cold email outreach and phone campaigns. Mailshake is designed for small to mid-sized teams that want effective outbound without the complexity of enterprise platforms like Outreach or Salesloft.
whyUseIt: Mailshake does one thing well: cold email at scale. It's easy to set up, has a clean interface, and includes deliverability features that keep your emails out of spam folders. For small teams running outbound campaigns, Mailshake provides the right balance of power and simplicity at a fraction of enterprise pricing.
aiCapabilities: Mailshake's AI assists with email writing, suggests send time optimisation, and provides deliverability analysis to improve inbox placement rates.
funnelPosition: Top of funnel — cold email outreach and follow-up automation
sellerWorkflow: SDRs create email campaigns, upload prospect lists, personalise messages with merge fields, schedule sends, and track opens/clicks/replies. Warm replies are flagged for manual follow-up.
managerExpects: Campaigns launched on schedule, personalisation completed for every prospect, deliverability monitored, and reply handling within 24 hours.
demoDescription: Create a new campaign, upload a prospect list, write email copy with personalisation tokens, schedule the send cadence, and review deliverability scores before launching.

vocabulary.definition: The percentage of your emails that reach the recipient's inbox rather than spam or promotions folders.
Gradually increasing email volume from a new domain to build sender reputation and avoid spam filters.

beginnerMistakes: Sending too many emails too fast from a new domain — destroying deliverability
Not warming up your email domain before launching campaigns
Ignoring bounce rates — high bounces damage your sender reputation permanently
